{{/* Lists an object's object-typed fields and promoted-type references as a single level of
  • s (scalars and maps are omitted; no recursion). Used in the "On this page" rail under Spec/Status and under each embedded object. Parameters: props (properties map), path (this object's dotted/anchor path), kind (CRD kind) */}} {{ $path := .path }} {{ $kind := .kind }} {{ range $k, $v := .props }} {{ $fieldPath := printf "%s.%s" $path $k }} {{ $f := partial "apiBuilder/getSpecFields" $v }} {{ $promoted := and $f.properties (partial "apiBuilder/promotedType" (dict "path" $fieldPath "kind" $kind)) }} {{ if $promoted }}
  • {{ $k }}
    • {{ else if $f.properties }}
  • {{ $k }}
    • {{ end }} {{ end }}
